subject: docs(session): add sandbox-whitelist precondition for next session
body:
User is whitelisting *.vercel.app on the Claude Code sandbox so the
next session can curl the deployed backend directly.  Updated the
"Key context" block of SESSION_NOTES.md so the next session:

1. Probes the sandbox state first (curl google.com sanity check)
   to determine whether egress is open or still blocked.
2. Knows it can run the docs/USER_ACTIONS.md diagnostic curls
   itself when the sandbox is open, vs needing to ask the user
   to run them when it's still closed.
3. Understands that whitelisting unlocks diagnosis only — Vercel
   dashboard work, redeploys, and tool-till-tees changes still
   require user action regardless of sandbox state.

No source changes.

Tags: documentation, session-notes, handoff
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
